title: Move Featured Collections section above About section on Home page

requirements.text: On the Home page, reorder the sections so that the FeaturedCollections component appears before the AboutSection component. The new order should be: Hero, Stats bar, FeaturedCollections, About, CollectionGallery, Reviews, FeedbackForm, AppointmentBooking.

quotes: Shift the featured collection above the about Luxyle page

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the Home page shows the Featured Collections grid before the About Luxyle section when scrolling down.
All other sections remain in their previous relative order (CollectionGallery, Reviews, FeedbackForm, AppointmentBooking follow After About).
No visual regressions are introduced in any of the affected sections.

nonGoals: Changing the content or styling of the FeaturedCollections or AboutSection components.
Reordering any pages in the navigation header.
